title: BedLoader
description: An updated client-side companion for GeyserSkinManager to restore Bedrock Edition player's skins on Java servers.
body:
# BedLoader (BedrockSkinUtility & BedrockSkinUtilityPlus)
An updated client-side companion for GeyserSkinManager to restore Bedrock Edition player's skins on Java servers.

![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca4fa4868dc00c05e5076719e7d119be081a7bb6_0.webp)

# Origin
Instead of writing a mod from scratch, I always wanted to learn Java to make mods. But this time I needed people's help to get this mod work. In the future I will try to keep it updated and learn how Java works. Origin: [https://github.com/Camotoy/BedrockSkinUtility](https://github.com/Camotoy/BedrockSkinUtility), updated: [https://github.com/Axionize/BedrockSkinUtilityPlus](https://github.com/Axionize/BedrockSkinUtilityPlus).

# Requirements
- Fabric loader 0.16.12 or newer.
- [GeyserSkinManager](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/geyserskinmanager.88607/) on the server.

# How it works
Drag the mod into your mods folder and make sure that [GeyserSkinManager](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/geyserskinmanager.88607/) is installed on the server you want to play on!

# Special thanks
Thanks for the FabricMC community to help this project by solving different problems that I encountered.

# Legal bits
Licensed under MIT license, just like the original project. You are free to download, edit and distribute this mod the way you want.
